overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Ghost of Tsushima showing a samurai warrior traversing a rainy forest path and approaching Mamushi Farmstead. The scene transitions from dense woodland to an open farmstead entrance with dramatic sun rays breaking through storm clouds, revealing a sacred tree with hanging bodies.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense forest trail with overhanging canopy

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the narrow forest trail surrounded by dense trees and foliage

entered.detail: tall trees with thick branches forming a dense overhead canopy
narrow dirt trail winding through the forest
rocks covered in moss lining the path edge

segments.scene_description: The samurai character moves through a narrow, enclosed forest path with dense canopy overhead. The environment is dark and moody with rain falling, and the path is lined with moss-covered rocks and thick vegetation.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest path ascending a grassy hillside

events.description: sunlight begins breaking through the storm clouds, illuminating the path ahead with golden rays

agents.ego_description: jogging uphill along the widening forest path as the terrain opens up and visibility improves

entered.detail: sloped terrain covered in tall grass flanking the path
large rock formations emerging from the hillside

segments.scene_description: The forest opens up as the path ascends a grassy hillside. Large boulders appear on the right while the dense canopy gives way to more sky visibility. Dramatic sunlight begins piercing through the storm clouds around the 22-second mark.

scene_state.functional_zone: Mamushi Farmstead approach with sacred tree

events.description: location text 'MAMUSHI FARMSTEAD' appears on screen as the farmstead entrance comes into view

agents.ego_description: approaching the distinctive sacred tree with hanging objects while moving toward the farmstead entrance

entered.detail: large twisted tree with multiple bodies hanging from its branches, silhouetted against the bright sky
several bodies suspended by ropes from the tree branches
simple wooden fence marking the farmstead boundary

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide grassy area approaching Mamushi Farmstead. A sacred tree with hanging bodies stands prominently in the center, backlit by dramatic sun rays breaking through the storm clouds. The location name appears on screen at 43 seconds.

scene_state.functional_zone: farmstead entrance with wooden gate and watchtowers

events.description: passing through the wooden gate structure into the farmstead courtyard

agents.ego_description: walking through the wooden gate into the farmstead, passing between watchtowers

entered.detail: large wooden gate structure with horizontal beams marking the farmstead entrance
traditional wooden farmhouse with tiled roof visible beyond the gate
tall wooden watchtower with platform and ladder on the left side of the gate

segments.scene_description: The samurai approaches and passes through the wooden farmstead gate, flanked by watchtowers. Traditional Japanese farm buildings become visible in the background as the character enters the Mamushi Farmstead compound, leaving the sacred tree behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dark, rainy woodland path into the stark, sun-drenched entrance of a farmstead. It begins with the samurai traversing a narrow forest trail enclosed by a dense canopy and moss-covered rocks under a moody downpour. As the path ascends a grassy hillside, the canopy thins and the environment opens up, allowing dramatic sunlight to pierce through the storm clouds. The scene then expands into a wide clearing where a sacred tree with hanging bodies stands backlit by the breaking light, just as the location name appears on screen. Finally, the camera follows the warrior through a wooden gate flanked by watchtowers, leaving the tree behind to enter the compound of Mamushi Farmstead.
